summary: Save Draft did not persist a new invoice. The UI flow created master data first, then the invoice insert failed.

confirmed_blocker.message: Could not find the 'client_id' column of 'invoices' in the schema cache

network_evidence: No successful invoice write was observed
Status pages did not contain INV-2026-4470

invoice_error.message: Could not find the 'client_id' column of 'invoices' in the schema cache
Could not find the 'client_id' column of 'invoices' in the schema cache

audit_interpretation: This is not just a visual issue. It is a draft-save integrity blocker.
The flow can create client/project master data before the invoice write fails, leaving orphaned setup records from a user's perspective.
The editor remains on /invoice/new and does not show a clear failure confirmation.
Status pages cannot show the new draft because no invoice row was persisted.
